title: FamilyLoadSettings
description: FamilyLoadSettings: Revit family load settings for Revit Adapter. Prototype, currently with limited functionality.

FamilyLibrary.description: Library of Revit families that can be loaded to the model. FamilyLibrary: Library of Revit families that can be loaded to the model.

OverwriteFamily.description: If true, Revit family will be overwritten on load, if false it will not be changed.

OverwriteParameterValues.description: If true, Revit family parameters will be overwritten on load, if false they will not be changed.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
